calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-06-2005 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-06-2005 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Court Trial Prov-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Noreen Ikeuye #3538
Scott Peebles, Esq. for Plaintiff: San Francisco housing Authority.
Plaintiff's witness: Kim Reeder, was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defendants: Cheryl Trulove and Larry Bradley.
Exhibit 1 - Fourteen-day notice-------------------ID/EVID.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant as follows:
Restitution and possession of the premises located at 1519 Sunnydale Ave., San Francisco.
Back Rent and Damages of $4,630.24
Costs per cost bill.
Rental Agreement declared forfeited.
Counsel stipulated for the return of the Exhibit in open court
Judgment signed in open court.

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-01-2005 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Case came on calendar as scheduled for settlement conference.
Judge Pro Tem: Andrew Westley Clerk: Anna Redigonda
Matter assigned to JPT Andrew Westley in Room 303-A for settlement conference.
Scott Peebles, Esq. present, appearing for Plaintiff
Wendy Lillie Doll, Esq. (limited scope attorney) appearing for Defendant Larry Bradley only, who is present.
Co-Defendant Cheryl Trulove, Defendant in Pro Per, was not present at roll call in Department 218.
Parties still in settlement negotiations after 5:00 PM this date. Counsel to inform Dept. 206 of outcome.
(Not reported)
